phase_name: Agent Evaluation — Phase E Eval Enhancement

phase_e1.scope: Runner加固: Recorder集成, Timeout, 并发, Allowlist, 回归检测
phase_e1.actual_changes: ~350 lines changed across 6 files, 25 integration tests (was 18), 4 new reporter unit tests

phase_e2.scope: 新套件: LlmJudge + provider(10) + memory(12) + e2e(8) = +40 tasks

phase_e3.scope: 多轨道: CLI/Server target + BFCL适配 + eval.toml + CI

notes: Phase E1 COMPLETE. All 6 tasks implemented: Recorder auto-integration (T1), Timeout enforcement via tokio::time::timeout wrapping collect_events (T2), Concurrent evaluation via buffer_unordered with stable result ordering (T3), Per-task tool allowlists via JsonlTask.tools field (T4), Regression detection with diff_report + regression_to_markdown (T5), Full verification 1891 tests passing (T6). Design gaps identified by reviewer agent were all addressed: ScoreDetails::Timeout variant, TaskResult/EvalReport Serialize/Deserialize derives, RegressionReport/TaskDiff/DiffStatus types, CLI --baseline parameter, tool_allowlist() trait method.
